UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing commercial driver details, contact info, and associated smart battery metadata.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user account

email.description: Registered email address of the driver

name.description: Full name of the commercial operator / driver

phone.description: Mobile phone number with country code

vehicleNumber.description: Commercial registration number of the e-rickshaw / e-vehicle

batteryBrand.description: Manufacturer brand name of the smart Li-Ion battery

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was registered

Complaint.title: Complaint
Complaint.description: Cyber security incident complaint report registered by an e-vehicle operator.

userId.description: The UID of the authenticated user who submitted the complaint, if logged in

name.description: Name of the person registering the complaint

phone.description: Contact phone number for security follow-up

vehicleNumber.description: E-rickshaw vehicle plate number associated with the incident

location.description: Geographical location where the cyber incident or anomaly took place

description.description: Elaborate textual description of the cyber threat or battery anomaly observed

category.description: Categorization of the reported security threat

status.description: Current resolution stage of the registered incident

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the incident complaint was logged

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of commercial operator user profiles indexed by their unique ID.

/complaints/{complaintId}.description: Global collection of cyber incidents and e-rickshaw battery tampering complaints.
